title: Fix API authentication bypass
original_text: Fixed an authentication bypass vulnerability in the API. The API was not properly validating JWT tokens on certain endpoints. Added proper token validation middleware. Implemented token expiration checking. Added token revocation support. Fixed permission checks on protected endpoints. Added audit logging for authentication failures. Added security tests for authentication flows. Result: 43 tests pass.
expected_subject: fix(security): fix API authentication bypass vulnerability
expected_body_lines: - Fix permission checks on protected endpoints
- Add audit logging for authentication failures
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(security): fix API authentication bypass vulnerability"
